name: ESP8266 Deauther
description: Spacehuhn's classic WiFi-testing tool for ESP8266 boards — scan/select APs, deauth, beacon/probe spam, via a served web UI or serial CLI. Authorized testing only.
note: 37 board-specific single merged .bin images flashed at 0x0 via esptool --chip esp8266 (assets verified live against v2.6.1 on 2026-07-02). The board bins are user-selectable variants (default: Wemos D1 mini, else NodeMCU). Flash uses --flash_size detect so a board's exact size need not be pre-known. esp8266 flash offset/params standard; real-hardware flash pending real-hardware verification per the Stage-5 gate.
